pet_notes: Strictly preserve the reference character: same oversized rounded head to small body ratio, same face placement, same blue oval eyes and small smile placement, same standing reading pose, same large blue open book size and position, same translucent cyan headset halo, soft blue-white 3D toy material. Future animation rows may change pose only as required by state, while keeping this exact identity and proportions.
style_notes: Soft polished 3D toy mascot, blue-white palette, no readable text, no logos, no redesign, no alternate costume.
style_contract: Pet-safe sprite: compact full-body mascot, readable in a 192x208 cell, clear silhouette, simple face, stable palette/materials, and crisp edges for chroma-key extraction. Style `3d-toy`: Stylized 3D toy mascot with smooth rounded forms, simple materials, clear silhouette, and no photoreal complexity.
